# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Plugin = {
  name?: string;
  init?: (ctx: PluginContext) => unknown | Promise<unknown>;
  fetch?: (req: Request, ctx: PluginContext) => Response | Promise<Response>;
  default?: unknown;
};

type PluginContext = {
  request: Request;
  url: URL;
  env: Record<string, string>;
  params: Record<string, string>;
  state: Map<string, unknown>;
  log: (...args: unknown[]) => void;
};

const state = new Map<string, unknown>();
const moduleCache = new Map<string, Promise<Plugin>>();

function getEnv(key: string): string | undefined {
  try {
    return Deno.env.get(key);
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

function parseList(v: string | null | undefined): string[] {
  if (!v) return [];
  return v
    .split(/[,\s]+/)
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function normalizeSpecifier(input: string): string {
  const s = input.trim();
  if (!s) throw new Error("Empty module specifier");
  // Allow absolute https/http, relative, and bare specifiers (import maps can resolve).
  if (
    s.startsWith("https://") || s.startsWith("http://") ||
    s.startsWith("./") || s.startsWith("../") || s.startsWith("/")
  ) return s;
  return s;
}

function allowSpecifier(spec: string, allowList: string[], denyList: string[]): boolean {
  const s = spec.toLowerCase();
  for (const d of denyList) {
    const dd = d.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!dd) continue;
    if (s.startsWith(dd)) return false;
  }
  if (allowList.length === 0) return true;
  for (const a of allowList) {
    const aa = a.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!aa) continue;
    if (s.startsWith(aa)) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function getConfiguredPluginSpecifiers(url: URL): string[] {
  const params: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of url.searchParams.entries()) params[k] = v;

  const qpModules = [
    ...parseList(url.searchParams.get("module")),
    ...parseList(url.searchParams.get("modules")),
    ...parseList(url.searchParams.get("plugin")),
    ...parseList(url.searchParams.get("plugins")),
  ];

  const envModules = [
    ...parseList(getEnv("PLUGIN_MODULES")),
    ...parseList(getEnv("PLUGIN_MODULE")),
    ...parseList(getEnv("MODULES")),
  ];

  const mode = (url.searchParams.get("mode") ?? getEnv("PLUGIN_MODE") ?? "merge")
    .toLowerCase();

  const list = mode === "query" ? qpModules : mode === "env" ? envModules : [...envModules, ...qpModules];

  const seen = new Set<string>();
  const out: string[] = [];
  for (const raw of list) {
    const spec = normalizeSpecifier(raw);
    if (seen.has(spec)) continue;
    seen.add(spec);
    out.push(spec);
  }
  return out;
}

async function loadPlugin(specifier: string): Promise<Plugin> {
  if (moduleCache.has(specifier)) return await moduleCache.get(specifier)!;

  const p = (async () => {
    const mod = await import(specifier);
    const plugin: Plugin = (mod?.default && typeof mod.default === "object")
      ? (mod.default as Plugin)
      : (mod as Plugin);
    return plugin;
  })();

  moduleCache.set(specifier, p);
  try {
    return await p;
  } catch (e) {
    moduleCache.delete(specifier);
    throw e;
  }
}

function json(body: unknown, status = 200, headers: HeadersInit = {}): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...headers,
    },
  });
}

function text(body: string, status = 200, headers: HeadersInit = {}): Response {
  return new Response(body, {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "text/plain; charset=utf-8",
      ...headers,
    },
  });
}

serve(async (request) => {
  const url = new URL(request.url);

  const allowList = parseList(getEnv("PLUGIN_ALLOW_PREFIXES"));
  const denyList = parseList(getEnv("PLUGIN_DENY_PREFIXES"));
  const specifiers = getConfiguredPluginSpecifiers(url)
    .filter((s) => allowSpecifier(s, allowList, denyList));

  const ctx: PluginContext = {
    request,
    url,
    env: (() => {
      const keys = parseList(getEnv("PLUGIN_EXPOSE_ENV_KEYS")) || [];
      const exposed: Record<string, string> = {};
      for (const k of keys) {
        const v = getEnv(k);
        if (v != null) exposed[k] = v;
      }
      return exposed;
    })(),
    params: Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams.entries()),
    state,
    log: (...args: unknown[]) => console.log("[plugin]", ...args),
  };

  if (url.pathname === "/health") return text("ok");

  if (url.pathname === "/_plugins") {
    return json({
      mode: (url.searchParams.get("mode") ?? getEnv("PLUGIN_MODE") ?? "merge"),
      configured: getConfiguredPluginSpecifiers(url),
      filtered: specifiers,
      allowList,
      denyList,
      cacheSize: moduleCache.size,
    });
  }

  const plugins: { spec: string; plugin: Plugin }[] = [];
  const errors: { spec: string; error: string }[] = [];

  for (const spec of specifiers) {
    try {
      const plugin = await loadPlugin(spec);
      plugins.push({ spec, plugin });
      if (typeof plugin.init === "function") await plugin.init(ctx);
    } catch (e) {
      errors.push({ spec, error: e instanceof Error ? `${e.name}: ${e.message}` : String(e) });
    }
  }

  for (const { plugin } of plugins) {
    if (typeof plugin.fetch === "function") {
      try {
        const res = await plugin.fetch(request, ctx);
        if (res) return res;
      } catch (e) {
        return json({
          error: "Plugin fetch() threw",
          detail: e instanceof Error ? `${e.name}: ${e.message}` : String(e),
        }, 500);
      }
    }
  }

  return json({
    message: "Deno Deploy dynamic plugin loader",
    request: { method: request.method, url: request.url, path: url.pathname },
    loaded: plugins.map((p) => ({
      spec: p.spec,
      name: p.plugin.name ?? null,
      hasFetch: typeof p.plugin.fetch === "function",
      hasInit: typeof p.plugin.init === "function",
    })),
    errors,
    usage: {
      env: {
        PLUGIN_MODULES: "Comma/space-separated module specifiers",
        PLUGIN_MODE: "merge | env | query",
        PLUGIN_ALLOW_PREFIXES: "Comma/space-separated prefixes (optional allowlist)",
        PLUGIN_DENY_PREFIXES: "Comma/space-separated prefixes (optional denylist)",
        PLUGIN_EXPOSE_ENV_KEYS: "Comma/space-separated env keys to expose to plugins via ctx.env",
      },
      query: {
        modules: "Comma/space-separated module specifiers (also: module, plugins, plugin)",
        mode: "merge | env | query",
      },
    },
  });
});
